text:
PRVDR_CLSFCTN_ACTV_IND_11 
PRVDR_CLSFCTN_ACTV_IND_12 
LABEL: 
Provider Classification Code Active Indicator — January through December 
DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate the provider’s taxonomy/classification information specified in the unique 
combination of taxonomy/classification variables (PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS and PRVDR_CLSFCTN_CD) was 
active in the given month. Each of 12 months.
SHORT NAME: PRVDR_CLSFCTN_ACTV_IND_01 
PRVDR_CLSFCTN_ACTV_IND_02 
PRVDR_CLSFCTN_ACTV_IND_03
